languages.text: Голова Эоганна частично отделена от туловища. Кожа и мышцы его шеи с хирургической точностью перерезаны, открывая иссохшие хрящи и почерневшие сосуды, похожие на толстых червей. Перекошенное лицо манипулуса покрыто потеками свернувшейся крови, застывшей, подобно смоле.

Eogunn's head has been partially severed from his body. His neck muscles and skin have been cut with surgical precision, revealing withered cartilage and blackened vessels resembling thick worms. The distorted features of the Manipulus are streaked with congealed, tar-like blood.
languages.original_text: Голова Эоганна частично отделена от туловища. Кожа и мышцы его шеи с хирургической точностью перерезаны, открывая иссохшие хрящи и почерневшие сосуды, похожие на толстых червей. Перекошенное лицо манипулуса покрыто потеками свернувшейся крови, застывшей, подобно смоле.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn's head is partially severed from his body. His neck muscles and skin have been cut with surgical precision, revealing withered cartilage and blackened vessels that look like thick worms. The distorted features of the Manipulus are streaked with congealed blood, set hard as tar.

Eogunn's head is partially severed from his body. His neck muscles and skin have been cut with surgical precision, revealing withered cartilage and blackened vessels that look like thick worms. The distorted features of the Manipulus are streaked with congealed blood, set hard as tar.

Eogunn's head has been partially severed from his body. His neck muscles and skin have been cut with surgical precision, revealing withered cartilage and blackened vessels resembling thick worms. The distorted features of the Manipulus are streaked with congealed, tar-like blood.

Eogunn's head has been partially severed from his body. His neck muscles and skin have been cut with surgical precision, revealing withered cartilage and blackened vessels resembling thick worms. The distorted features of the Manipulus are streaked with congealed, tar-like blood.

languages.text: La cabeza de Eogunn está parcialmente separada de su cuerpo. Los músculos y la piel de su cuello se han cortado con precisión quirúrgica, revelando cartílagos marchitados y venas ennegrecidas y gruesas como orugas. Las facciones distorsionadas del manipulus presentan manchas de una sangre coagulada que recuerda al alquitrán.
languages.original_text: Eogunn's head has been partially severed from his body. His neck muscles and skin have been cut with surgical precision, revealing withered cartilage and blackened vessels resembling thick worms. The distorted features of the Manipulus are streaked with congealed, tar-like blood.

traits.locale_text: La cabeza de Eogunn está parcialmente separada de su cuerpo. Los músculos y la piel de su cuello se han cortado con precisión quirúrgica, revelando cartílagos marchitados y venas ennegrecidas y gruesas como orugas. Las facciones distorsionadas del manipulus presentan manchas de una sangre coagulada que recuerda al alquitrán.

languages.text: 伊奥贡的头颅几乎已经与身体分离。他颈部的肌肉与皮肤被以外科手术般的精准手法剖开，露出萎缩的软骨和如同肥厚蠕虫的乌黑血管。操纵者那扭曲的面容上，沾满了一道道凝结如焦油般的血痕。
languages.original_text: Eogunn's head has been partially severed from his body. His neck muscles and skin have been cut with surgical precision, revealing withered cartilage and blackened vessels resembling thick worms. The distorted features of the Manipulus are streaked with congealed, tar-like blood.

traits.locale_text: 伊奥贡的头颅几乎已经与身体分离。他颈部的肌肉与皮肤被以外科手术般的精准手法剖开，露出萎缩的软骨和如同肥厚蠕虫的乌黑血管。操纵者那扭曲的面容上，沾满了一道道凝结如焦油般的血痕。

languages.text: Eogunns Kopf wurde teilweise vom Rumpf getrennt. Seine Nackenmuskeln und seine Haut wurden mit chirurgischer Präzision durchtrennt und legen verwitterte Knorpel und geschwärzte Gefäße frei, die an fette Würmer erinnern. Die verzerrten Gesichtszüge des Manipulus sind mit geronnenem Blut verschmiert, das dich an Teer erinnert.
languages.original_text: Eogunn's head has been partially severed from his body. His neck muscles and skin have been cut with surgical precision, revealing withered cartilage and blackened vessels resembling thick worms. The distorted features of the Manipulus are streaked with congealed, tar-like blood.

traits.locale_text: Eogunns Kopf wurde teilweise vom Rumpf getrennt. Seine Nackenmuskeln und seine Haut wurden mit chirurgischer Präzision durchtrennt und legen verwitterte Knorpel und geschwärzte Gefäße frei, die an fette Würmer erinnern. Die verzerrten Gesichtszüge des Manipulus sind mit geronnenem Blut verschmiert, das dich an Teer erinnert.

languages.text: La tête d'Eogunn a été partiellement séparée de son corps. Les muscles et la peau de son cou ont été sectionnés avec une précision chirurgicale, dévoilant des cartilages atrophiés et des vaisseaux noircis semblables à de gros vers de terre. Les traits déformés du manipulus sont maculés de sang coagulé, épais comme du goudron.
languages.original_text: Eogunn's head has been partially severed from his body. The distorted features of the Manipulus are streaked with congealed, tar-like blood.

traits.locale_text: La tête d'Eogunn a été partiellement séparée de son corps. Les muscles et la peau de son cou ont été sectionnés avec une précision chirurgicale, dévoilant des cartilages atrophiés et des vaisseaux noircis semblables à de gros vers de terre. Les traits déformés du manipulus sont maculés de sang coagulé, épais comme du goudron.

languages.text: Eogunn'un başı, vücudundan kısmen kopmuş. Boyun kasları ve derisi, cerrahi bir hassasiyetle kesilerek kurumuş kıkırdakları ve kalın solucanları andıran kararmış damarları ortaya çıkarmış. Manipülus'un çarpık hatlarına pıhtılaşmış, katran benzeri kan bulaşmış.
languages.original_text: Eogunn's head has been partially severed from his body. His neck muscles and skin have been cut with surgical precision, revealing withered cartilage and blackened vessels resembling thick worms. The distorted features of the Manipulus are streaked with congealed, tar-like blood.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn'un başı, vücudundan kısmen kopmuş. Boyun kasları ve derisi, cerrahi bir hassasiyetle kesilerek kurumuş kıkırdakları ve kalın solucanları andıran kararmış damarları ortaya çıkarmış. Manipülus'un çarpık hatlarına pıhtılaşmış, katran benzeri kan bulaşmış.

languages.text: エオグンの首は、体から部分的に切り離されている。首の筋肉や皮膚は、外科手術のような精密さで切り裂かれ、枯れた軟骨や、太い虫のような黒く変色した血管が露わになっている。マニピュラスの歪んだ顔には、焦げ付いたような血液が流れ落ちている。
